canvas_async.load_error.message.developer_comment: Error message shown when the canvas component fails to load.

canvas_controls.exit_after_save.descript.developer_comment: Explains the canvas control button that exits full-screen mode after autosave has captured the user's drawing.

canvas_controls.color_picker.description.developer_comment: Explains the canvas control button that opens the color picker.

canvas_controls.pan.description.developer_comment: Explains the canvas control button that activates or deactivates pan mode. When active, dragging moves the canvas instead of drawing.

canvas_controls.clear_all.description.developer_comment: Explains the canvas control button that removes all drawn strokes.

canvas_block.loading_image.message.developer_comment: Status text shown while the background image is loading in the canvas.

canvas_block.load_image.error.developer_comment: Error message shown when the background image fails to load in the canvas.

canvas_block.draw_instruction.message.developer_comment: Instruction message shown in draw mode before the user has made any strokes.
